query:
SELECT p.id, p.name, p.preConMonths, p.constructionMonths, p.financingScenario,
  s.itemKey, s.section, s.distributionMethod, s.startMonth, s.endMonth, s.lumpSumMonth, s.fundingSource
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN project_cash_flow_settings s ON s.projectId = p.id AND s.scenario = COALESCE(p.financingScenario, 'offplan_escrow') AND s.isActive = 1 AND s.section = 'construction'
ORDER BY p.id, s.sortOrder
LIMIT 60

SELECT p.id, p.name, p.preConMonths, p.constructionMonths, p.financingScenario,
  s.itemKey, s.section, s.distributionMethod, s.startMonth, s.endMonth, s.lumpSumMonth, s.fundingSource
FROM projects p
LEFT JOIN project_cash_flow_settings s ON s.projectId = p.id AND s.scenario = COALESCE(p.financingScenario, 'offplan_escrow') AND s.isActive = 1 AND s.section = 'construction'
ORDER BY p.id, s.sortOrder
LIMIT 60
